summary: Seven workflow modes resolve to five packets; three improvement modes share deep-improvement.
All five child routers express resources relative to child SKILL_ROOT and omit packet identity at hub scope.

The implied typed coordinate is workflowMode paired with a packet-qualified child leaf.
inference: Based on registry packet ownership and child router resource maps.
